name: Oatmeal Cookies "the Best
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Oatmeal (or 1/2 cup Wheat germ for healthier cookies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine eggs, raisins, and vanilla extract in a bowl and let stand for one hour, covered with plastic wrap.
2. Cream together butter and sugars until smooth.
3. Gradually add flour, salt, cinnamon, and baking soda to the sugar mixture.
4. Mix in the egg-raisin mixture, oatmeal (or wheat germ), and chopped nuts.
5. The dough will be stiff; form heaping teaspoons of dough into balls and place them on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Alternatively, roll the dough into small balls and flatten slightly on the cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F for 10 to 12 minutes or until lightly browned.
Note: The secret to delicious cookies is soaking the raisins in vanilla extract for one hour before baking.
